subcodes.first_line: Praise be unto God Who hath sent down the Book and manifested through it that which guideth mankind unto the straight path. Verily He is [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الحمد لله الذی انزل الکتاب و اظهر به ما هدی الناس الی سواء الصراط انه لهو
subcodes.subjects: @marriage as means of spiritual progress, @consultation, @transcendence; unknowability of God
